'''βàösh-ch-j-j''' ('''kashachjejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impasto|impasto]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impasto|impasto]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàösh-ch-j-j
|-
! Lemma
| kashachjejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishachjejoko|thishachjejoko]] || [[word:jishachjejoko|jishachjejoko]] || [[word:shishachjejoko|shishachjejoko]] || [[word:kishachjejoko|kishachjejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushachjejoko|thuthushachjejoko]] || [[word:jujushachjejoko|jujushachjejoko]] || [[word:shushushachjejoko|shushushachjejoko]] || [[word:kukushachjejoko|kukushachjejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushachjejoko|thushachjejoko]] || [[word:jushachjejoko|jushachjejoko]] || [[word:shushachjejoko|shushachjejoko]] || [[word:kushachjejoko|kushachjejoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshachjejoko|thoshachjejoko]] || [[word:joshachjejoko|joshachjejoko]] || [[word:shoshachjejoko|shoshachjejoko]] || [[word:koshachjejoko|koshachjejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠshachjejoko|thΟΠshachjejoko]] || [[word:jΟΠshachjejoko|jΟΠshachjejoko]] || [[word:shΟΠshachjejoko|shΟΠshachjejoko]] || [[word:kΟΠshachjejoko|kΟΠshachjejoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashachjejithi|shashachjejithi]] || [[word:shashachjejiji|shashachjejiji]] || [[word:shashachjejishi|shashachjejishi]] || [[word:shashachjejiki|shashachjejiki]]
